22.gl: properly, something inherited, i.e. (abstractly) occupancy, or (concretely) an heirloom; generally an estate, patrimony or portion
22.kj: heritage, to inherit, inheritance, possession. Compare H5158 (נַחַל).

22.gl: kindness; by implication (towards God) piety; rarely (by opposition) reproof, or (subject.) beauty
22.kj: favour, good deed(-liness, -ness), kindly, (loving-) kindness, merciful (kindness), mercy, pity, reproach, wicked thing.

22.gl: Jisrael, a symbolical name of Jacob; also (typically) of his posterity
22.dv: from H8280 (שָׂרָה) and H410 (אֵל); he will rule as God;

23.gl: properly, concealed, i.e. the vanishing point; generally, time out of mind (past or future), i.e. (practically) eternity; frequentatively, adverbial (especially with prepositional prefix) always
23.kj: alway(-s), ancient (time), any more, continuance, eternal, (for, (n-)) ever(-lasting, -more, of old), lasting, long (time), (of) old (time), perpetual, at any time, (beginning of t

23.gl: properly, to mark (so as to be recognized), i.e. to remember; by implication, to mention;  to be male
23.kj: [idiom] burn (incense), [idiom] earnestly, be male, (make) mention (of), be mindful, recount, record(-er), remember, make to be remembered, bring (call, come, keep, put) to (in) re
23.dv: a primitive root; also as denominative from H2145 (זָכָר)

23.gl: kindness; by implication (towards God) piety; rarely (by opposition) reproof, or (subject.) beauty
23.kj: favour, good deed(-liness, -ness), kindly, (loving-) kindness, merciful (kindness), mercy, pity, reproach, wicked thing.

24.gl: narrow; (as a noun) a tight place (usually figuratively, i.e. trouble); also a pebble ; (transitive) an opponent (as crowding)
24.kj: adversary, afflicted(-tion), anguish, close, distress, enemy, flint, foe, narrow, small, sorrow, strait, tribulation, trouble.
24.dv: or צָר; from H6887 (צָרַר); compare as in H6864 (צֹר)

24.gl: kindness; by implication (towards God) piety; rarely (by opposition) reproof, or (subject.) beauty
24.kj: favour, good deed(-liness, -ness), kindly, (loving-) kindness, merciful (kindness), mercy, pity, reproach, wicked thing.

24.gl: to break off or crunch; figuratively, to deliver
24.kj: break (off), deliver, redeem, rend (in pieces), tear in pieces.

25.gl: to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)
25.kj: add, apply, appoint, ascribe, assign, [idiom] avenge, [idiom] be (healed), bestow, bring (forth, hither), cast, cause, charge, come, commit, consider, count, [phrase] cry, deliver

25.gl: properly, concealed, i.e. the vanishing point; generally, time out of mind (past or future), i.e. (practically) eternity; frequentatively, adverbial (especially with prepositional prefix) always
25.kj: alway(-s), ancient (time), any more, continuance, eternal, (for, (n-)) ever(-lasting, -more, of old), lasting, long (time), (of) old (time), perpetual, at any time, (beginning of t

25.gl: kindness; by implication (towards God) piety; rarely (by opposition) reproof, or (subject.) beauty
25.kj: favour, good deed(-liness, -ness), kindly, (loving-) kindness, merciful (kindness), mercy, pity, reproach, wicked thing.

25.gl: flesh (from its freshness); by extension, body, person; also (by euphemistically) the pudenda of aman
25.kj: body, (fat, lean) flesh(-ed), kin, (man-) kind, [phrase] nakedness, self, skin.

25.gl: food (for man or beast), especially bread, or grain (for making it)
25.kj: (shew-) bread, [idiom] eat, food, fruit, loaf, meat, victuals.
25.dv: from H3898 (לָחַם); See also H1036 (בֵּית לְעַפְרָה)

26.gl: properly, concealed, i.e. the vanishing point; generally, time out of mind (past or future), i.e. (practically) eternity; frequentatively, adverbial (especially with prepositional prefix) always
26.kj: alway(-s), ancient (time), any more, continuance, eternal, (for, (n-)) ever(-lasting, -more, of old), lasting, long (time), (of) old (time), perpetual, at any time, (beginning of t

26.gl: physically, to throw (a stone, an arrow) at or away; especially to revere or worship (with extended hands); intensively, to bemoan (by wringing the hands)
26.dv: a primitive root; used only as denominative from H3027 (יָד); literally, to use (i.e. hold out) the hand;

26.gl: the sky (as aloft; the dual perhaps alluding to the visible arch in which the clouds move, as well as to the higher ether where the celestial bodies revolve)
26.dv: dual of an unused singular שָׁמֶה; from an unused root meaning to be lofty;

26.gl: kindness; by implication (towards God) piety; rarely (by opposition) reproof, or (subject.) beauty
26.kj: favour, good deed(-liness, -ness), kindly, (loving-) kindness, merciful (kindness), mercy, pity, reproach, wicked thing.

26.gl: strength; as adjective, mighty; especially the Almighty (but used also of any deity)
26.kj: God (god), [idiom] goodly, [idiom] great, idol, might(-y one), power, strong. Compare names in '-el.'
